intended_use: InferRead CT Stroke.AI is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and
intended_use_full: InferRead CT Stroke.AI is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging suspected positive findings of intracranial hemorrhage (ICH).
ground_truth: Ground truth established by trained neuro-radiologists for detection of intracranial hemorrhage
other_metrics: InferRead time-to-notification: 1.07 ± 0.57 minutes; standard of care time-to-open-exam: 75.4±192.7 minutes (P < 0.001)
